your-ds-tokens.description: Authoritative token list for <Your DS Name>. Referenced by Design Analyst (brief extraction) and Library Researcher (audit).

your-ds-components.description: Component registry for <Your DS Name>. Referenced by Library Researcher (composition audit) and Component Architect (what to compose vs. build).

your-ds-icons.description: Icon registry for <Your DS Name>. Referenced by Design Analyst (asset extraction).

_note: Replace package names, tool names, and descriptions with your DS's actual MCP endpoints. This file is merged into the plugin's .mcp.json at runtime when this adapter is active.
